text: /design The first version must keep the existing webhook contract, reuse the current admin auth flow, and stay deployable on our single Postgres stack. We can add a small operator dashboard, but no new event bus yet.
I grounded the relevant code paths and docs. You already pinned the compatibility and deployment constraints, so I only need one design blocker resolved before I write the design.

input.question: Which control plane should own retry decisions in v1?

options.label: Inline in the billing service
options.description: Keep retries managed directly inside the existing service

options.label: Dedicated retry module
options.description: Add a dedicated retry module inside the current service boundary

text: Dedicated retry module inside the current billing service.

[Requirements]
Goal:           Design the first version of the billing retry flow.
Inputs:         Approved brief, billing codebase, and grounded library docs.
Constraints:    Must keep the existing webhook contract; reuse the current admin auth flow; stay deployable on the single Postgres stack; no new event bus in v1.
Assumptions:    A small operator dashboard is acceptable inside the current admin surface.
Open questions: None.

Design written to `.pipeline/design.md`. Run `/review` next.
